analysis_commentary: Max collapse decisively prevented: bounded at 0.33 vs baseline 1.0 locked, well under the 0.90 bad threshold. Grad norm halved (68.9→30.7) and value head less saturated (0.37→0.22). Illegal_mass still ~1 because learning stalled under regularization, not collapsed. Of two goal diagnostics, one moved dramatically right, the other unchanged — net meaningful progress against policy collapse.
